calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1683 21st Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lillian Ng, Esq. appearing in person for Erin L. Markey, Administrator, appearing via Zoom.

The sale was confirmed at $1,575,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,480,000.00 is required.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Guitron. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lillian Ng for petitioner Erin L. Markey (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the instant petition. No objections were raised. There being no objection, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
